backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the backend for a fashion e-commerce app with product CRUD (admin-only) and user profile management, using role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and AccessControl modules.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the regeneration of the Attack on Titan T-shirt image in AttackOnTitanGallery.tsx to test ID REQ-1 with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing their roles in the Fashion Forum React application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Fashion Forum app that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for product browsing, product detail, and admin pages, and conditionally renders a ProfileSetup modal for authenticated users without a profile.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Displays a centered access-denied message with a shield icon and a link back to the product listing for unauthorized admin page access attempts.
frontend/src/components/AttackOnTitanGal: Swipeable image gallery component for Attack on Titan T-shirt images, supporting touch/mouse swipe gestures, navigation arrows, thumbnail indicators, and a Meesho affiliate link button.
frontend/src/components/CategoryFilter.t: Renders a row of pill-shaped buttons for filtering products by category, highlighting the currently selected category.
frontend/src/components/CategoryImageSec: Displays a clickable category thumbnail that expands to reveal a grid of product images, with lazy loading, skeleton placeholders, and error states for each image.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout component providing a sticky header with navigation, Internet Identity login/logout, admin link, and a footer with copyright info.
frontend/src/components/LoadingTimeout.t: Loading indicator component that shows a spinner during loading and switches to a timeout alert with an optional retry button after a configurable delay.
frontend/src/components/MeeshoProductSec: Renders a clickable product image linking to a Meesho affiliate URL, with a loading spinner and a hover overlay effect.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Displays a product as a card with a lazy-loaded image, Pinterest pin badge, category badge, name, and price, linking to the product detail page.
frontend/src/components/ProductForm.tsx: Reusable form component for creating or editing a product, with validated fields for name, description, price, category, image URL, and optional Pinterest pin ID.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Modal dialog that prompts a newly authenticated user to enter their name and saves it via the user profile mutation before proceeding.
frontend/src/components/SwipeableGallery: A swipeable image gallery component supporting touch and mouse drag gestures, with navigation arrows, image counter dots, and a Meesho external link button. Uses useSwipeGesture and useImageLoader hooks for interaction and lazy loading with retry logic.
frontend/src/components/WatchProductSect: Displays a carousel of ABREXO watch product images with lazy loading and a Meesho affiliate link button using a lookout icon.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) access, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useImageLoader.ts: Custom hook that manages image loading state with automatic retry logic and fallback to a placeholder image on failure.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flows, and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for CRUD operations on products and user profile/admin queries against the ICP backend actor, with toast notifications for mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useSwipeGesture.ts: Custom hook that tracks touch and mouse drag events to detect left/right swipe gestures beyond a configurable threshold and invoke corresponding callbacks.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), sets up Tailwind directives, and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for a warm neutral fashion e-commerce color palette in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AdminProducts.tsx: Admin-only page for managing fashion products, providing a table view with add, edit, and delete functionality via dialogs and confirmation alerts, with access control based on caller admin status.
frontend/src/pages/ProductBrowse.tsx: Main product browsing page featuring a hero banner, category filtering, product grid, and several promotional sections (swipeable gallery, watch products, Meesho links, Attack on Titan gallery) with loading and error states.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Product detail page that displays a single product's image, name, price, description, category badge, and an optional Pinterest pin link, with loading skeletons and error handling.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, persist them to sessionStorage, and clean sensitive parameters from the URL hash without page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that maps OKLCH CSS variables to semantic color tokens, extends the theme with custom fonts (Inter, Playfair Display), border radii, box shadows, and accordion animations, and registers typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state and metadata for a task to regenerate and reload the Attack on Titan T-shirt image used in the AttackOnTitanGallery component. Contains schema version, feature requests, image requirements, and architectural notes.
